title: add gpt-5.4-mini
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- adds `gpt-5.4-mini` as a new text model (free tier, not paid-only)
- pricing matches OpenAI: $0.75 / $0.075 / $4.50 per 1M (in / cached / out), 400k ctx
- routes through Azure eastus deployment `gpt-5.4-mini` at 15000 TPM (just created)
- moves `gpt-5-mini` alias from `openai` (nano) to the new mini — fixes misleading routing where "mini" callers landed on nano
- adds `openai-mini` alias to the new mini

gpt-5.5-pro was considered but isn't available on Azure OpenAI in any region yet, so it's not included.

battle-tested locally: text/image/tools/streaming all 200, error matrix returns clean 400s, burst at n=30 had 0 failures with p95 ~1.2s, alias routing verified, `enter` aliases.test.ts 187/187 pass.

gist.headline: A new mini enters the chat
gist.blurb: We've added GPT-5.4-Mini to our text models, available for everyone on the free tier. Plus, we've rewired the 'mini' aliases so they point to the right place!
gist.summary: Added gpt-5.4-mini as a new free-tier text model routed through Azure, and updated the gpt-5-mini and openai-mini aliases to point to it instead of the nano model.
gist.impact: Users can now access OpenAI's gpt-5.4-mini model directly or via the updated gpt-5-mini and openai-mini aliases, with full support for text, images, tools, and streaming.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee welcoming a new, smaller, but powerful robot companion (representing the 'mini' AI model). The tiny robot represents the new GPT-5.4-Mini model joining the existing cast.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming a tiny, energetic robot companion with a glowing blue CRT screen head. The tiny robot is holding a small glowing text scroll. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
